hero.title: Explore Your
hero.description: Through carefully designed psychological tests, gain deep insights into your personality traits, behavioral patterns, and potential strengths. Start your journey of self-discovery today!

accuracy.title: Scientific & Accurate
accuracy.description: Test designs based on psychological research ensure reliable and valid results.

privacy.title: Privacy Protected
privacy.description: All test data is strictly confidential. Your privacy is our top priority.

insights.title: Deep Insights
insights.description: Get detailed personality analysis reports to understand your strengths and growth areas.

free.title: Completely Free
free.description: All tests are completely free. Get full reports without any payment.

user1.name: Alex Chen
user1.content: This test gave me a whole new understanding of myself. The results are incredibly accurate! I recommend it to anyone who wants to know themselves better.

user2.name: Sarah Wang
user2.content: The interface is beautifully designed, and the testing process is fun. The result analysis showed me my strengths and areas for improvement.

user3.name: Mike Zhang
user3.content: As a rational person, I was skeptical about psychological tests. But the results of this test really surprised me - it's so accurate!

cta.title: Ready to Discover Your True Self?
cta.description: Start your first psychological test now and discover the unique personality hidden deep within you.

personality-type.title: Your Personality Type Test
personality-type.description: Discover your unique personality traits and behavioral patterns through 10 interesting questions.

Chat with a few familiar friends
Find a quiet corner and observe your surroundings
Concrete facts and details
Overall patterns and possibilities

questions.text: When making decisions, you rely more on:

options.text: Logical analysis and objective standards
Personal values and others' feelings

options.text: Plan ahead and follow the plan

options.text: Fast-paced and full of changes

options.text: Offer practical solutions

questions.text: In team projects, you usually play the role of:

options.text: Organizer - assigning tasks and ensuring progress
Creator - providing new ideas and directions
Coordinator - ensuring team harmony

analyst.title: The Analytical Thinker (INTJ/INTP)
analyst.description: You are an independent, rational, and insightful thinker. You excel at strategic planning and systems analysis, and enjoy deeply understanding complex concepts. At work, you pursue efficiency and innovation, and can see patterns and possibilities that others miss. Your strengths lie in logical thinking and long-term vision, but you may sometimes appear too rational or insufficiently attentive to others' feelings.

diplomat.title: The Idealist (INFJ/INFP)
diplomat.description: You are an empathetic, creative, and idealistic person. You deeply understand others' emotions and needs, and excel at building deep relationships. You pursue meaning and purpose, and enjoy helping others grow and develop. Your strengths lie in intuition and empathy, but you may sometimes be too idealistic or easily hurt.

sentinel.title: The Guardian (ISTJ/ISFJ)
sentinel.description: You are a reliable, practical, and responsible person. You value tradition and order, and excel at establishing stable systems and processes. You are the backbone of any team, always completing tasks on time and ensuring quality. Your strengths lie in reliability and focus, but you may sometimes be too conservative or resistant to change.

explorer.title: The Explorer (ISTP/ISFP)
explorer.description: You are a flexible, adaptable, and experience-oriented person. You live in the present, and excel at handling unexpected situations and practical problems. You enjoy hands-on practice and have keen observation of your surroundings. Your strengths lie in flexibility and pragmatism, but you may sometimes be too impulsive or lack long-term planning.

executive.title: The Executive (ESTJ/ENTJ)
executive.description: You are a decisive, confident, and organized leader. You excel at making plans, assigning tasks, and ensuring goals are met. You enjoy challenges and competition, and can stay calm under pressure. Your strengths lie in decision-making and execution, but you may sometimes be too assertive or insufficiently considerate of others' feelings.

campaigner.title: The Campaigner (ENFJ/ENFP)
campaigner.description: You are an enthusiastic, charismatic, and inspiring person. You enjoy social activities and can easily connect with all kinds of people. You are full of energy and creativity, and always see the positive side of things. Your strengths lie in social skills and charisma, but you may sometimes spread yourself too thin or have difficulty focusing.

mbti-personality.title: MBTI Personality Type Test
mbti-personality.description: Explore your 16 personality types through 20 classic questions, understand your personality traits, strengths, and suitable development directions.

INTJ.title: The Architect (INTJ) - Independent Strategist
INTJ.description: You are imaginative and strategic thinkers, with a plan for everything. You have a unique perspective and strong analytical skills, excelling at seeing the big picture and making long-term plans. You pursue knowledge and self-improvement, and are natural leaders and innovators.

INTP.title: The Logician (INTP) - Innovative Thinker
INTP.description: You are innovative inventors with an unquenchable thirst for knowledge. You enjoy analyzing problems and exploring new concepts, pursuing logical perfection. Your thinking is flexible and you can see things from multiple angles, but sometimes may get too absorbed in your own world of ideas.

ENTJ.title: The Commander (ENTJ) - Decisive Leader
ENTJ.description: You are bold, imaginative, and strong-willed leaders, always finding or creating solutions. You have natural organizational and decision-making abilities, excelling at motivating others to pursue common goals. You pursue efficiency and achievement, and are natural strategists.

ENTP.title: The Debater (ENTP) - Smart Curious Thinker
ENTP.description: You are smart and curious thinkers who cannot resist an intellectual challenge. You enjoy debating and exploring new ideas, with quick thinking and creativity. You excel at discovering possibilities but may lack patience with daily details. Your energy and wit make you excellent problem solvers.

INFJ.title: The Advocate (INFJ) - Quiet Mystic
INFJ.description: You are quiet and mystical people, yet very inspiring and tireless idealists. You deeply understand others, with strong intuition and insight. You pursue meaning and purpose, excelling at helping others realize their potential, but sometimes may be too idealistic.

INFP.title: The Mediator (INFP) - Poetic Altruist
INFP.description: You are poetic, kind altruists, always eager to help a good cause. You have a rich inner world and deep values, pursuing authenticity and self-expression. You are creative and empathetic, but sometimes may be too sensitive or avoid conflict.

ENFJ.title: The Protagonist (ENFJ) - Charismatic Leader
ENFJ.description: You are charismatic and inspiring leaders, able to mesmerize their listeners. You naturally understand others and motivate them to grow, making excellent mentors and team builders. You pursue harmony and helping others, but sometimes may care too much about others while neglecting yourself.

ENFP.title: The Campaigner (ENFP) - Enthusiastic Creative
ENFP.description: You are enthusiastic, creative, and sociable free spirits, who can always find a reason to smile. You are full of energy and imagination, excelling at discovering possibilities and motivating others. You pursue variety and new experiences, but sometimes may have difficulty focusing or following through.

ISTJ.title: The Logistician (ISTJ) - Practical Pragmatist
ISTJ.description: You are very practical and fact-minded individuals whose reliability cannot be doubted. You value tradition and order, excelling at establishing stable systems and processes. You are the backbone of any team, always completing tasks on time and ensuring quality, but sometimes may be too conservative or resistant to change.

ISFJ.title: The Defender (ISFJ) - Dedicated Protector
ISFJ.description: You are very dedicated and warm protectors, always ready to defend your loved ones. You are reliable and considerate, noticing others' needs and providing support. You value harmony and responsibility, but sometimes may care too much about others while neglecting yourself.

ESTJ.title: The Executive (ESTJ) - Excellent Manager
ESTJ.description: You are excellent administrators, unsurpassed at managing things or people. You have natural organizational and decision-making abilities, excelling at establishing structure and ensuring efficiency. You pursue order and tradition, but sometimes may be too assertive or not flexible enough.

ESFJ.title: The Consul (ESFJ) - Considerate Caregiver
ESFJ.description: You are extraordinarily caring, social, and popular people, always eager to help. You excel at building harmonious relationships, valuing tradition and community. You naturally care for others, but sometimes may be too dependent on others' approval.

ISTP.title: The Virtuoso (ISTP) - Bold Practitioner
ISTP.description: You are bold and practical experimenters, masters of all kinds of tools. You live in the moment, excelling at solving practical problems and handling unexpected situations. You enjoy hands-on practice and have keen observation of your surroundings, but sometimes may be too impulsive or lack long-term planning.

ISFP.title: The Adventurer (ISFP) - Flexible Artist
ISFP.description: You are flexible and charming artists, always ready to explore and experience something new. You are sensitive and creative, pursuing authenticity and self-expression. You adapt well to environments, but sometimes may be too passive or have difficulty making decisions.

ESTP.title: The Entrepreneur (ESTP) - Smart Risk-Taker
ESTP.description: You are smart, energetic, and perceptive people who truly enjoy living on the edge. You excel at seizing opportunities and meeting challenges, with quick thinking and adaptability. You pursue excitement and variety, but sometimes may be too impulsive or ignore consequences.

ESFP.title: The Entertainer (ESFP) - Spontaneous Performer
ESFP.description: You are spontaneous, energetic entertainers, and life is never boring around you. You are full of energy and charisma, excelling at keeping the mood light and making others happy. You live in the moment, pursuing joy and new experiences, but sometimes may pursue excitement too much without considering the long term.
